  "triggers": [
    { "on": "issue-close", "repo": "Soul-Brews-Studio/maw-js", "action": "maw hey pulse-oracle 'issue closed'" },
    { "on": "pr-merge", "repo": "Soul-Brews-Studio/maw-js", "action": "maw done neo-mawjs" },
    { "on": "agent-idle", "timeout": 30, "action": "maw sleep {agent}" }
  ]
